jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Craftsvilla
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Craftsvilla! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
